description: Repurposed BotLens candle continuity dashboard. Compares classified continuity summaries at source, ingestion, selected-symbol snapshot, and final full-run boundaries so expected sparsity is separated from defects.

panels.title: Defect Gap Count by Stage

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_bootstrap' THEN 'source_bootstrap' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_facts' THEN 'source_facts' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_ingest_admission' THEN 'ingest_admission' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_bootstrap_snapshot' THEN 'run_bootstrap_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_selected_symbol_snapshot' THEN 'selected_symbol_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_final' THEN 'run_final' ELSE COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, 'unknown') END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'candle_continuity_defect_gap_count' AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Stage where provider, ingestion, or unknown gaps first appear over time. Expected session gaps are excluded.

panels.title: Max Gap Multiple by Stage

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_bootstrap' THEN 'source_bootstrap' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_facts' THEN 'source_facts' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_ingest_admission' THEN 'ingest_admission' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_bootstrap_snapshot' THEN 'run_bootstrap_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_selected_symbol_snapshot' THEN 'selected_symbol_snapshot' ELSE COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, 'unknown') END AS metric, max(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'candle_continuity_max_gap_multiple' AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Severity of the worst gap seen at each continuity boundary.

panels.title: Continuity Ratio by Stage

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_bootstrap' THEN 'source_bootstrap' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_facts' THEN 'source_facts' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_ingest_admission' THEN 'ingest_admission' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_bootstrap_snapshot' THEN 'run_bootstrap_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_selected_symbol_snapshot' THEN 'selected_symbol_snapshot' ELSE COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, 'unknown') END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'candle_continuity_ratio' AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Compact continuity trend that makes degradation obvious without per-candle noise.

panels.title: Latest Boundary Comparison

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, ''), COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, ''), m.metric_name) NULLIF(m.run_id, '') AS run_id, NULLIF(m.series_key, '') AS series_key, CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_bootstrap' THEN 'source_bootstrap' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_facts' THEN 'source_facts' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_ingest_admission' THEN 'ingest_admission' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_bootstrap_snapshot' THEN 'run_bootstrap_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_selected_symbol_snapshot' THEN 'selected_symbol_snapshot' ELSE COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, 'unknown') END AS pipeline_stage, m.metric_name, m.value, m.observed_at FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('candle_continuity_candle_count', 'candle_continuity_gap_count', 'candle_continuity_missing_candle_estimate', 'candle_continuity_max_gap_multiple', 'candle_continuity_ratio') AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') ORDER BY COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, ''), COALESCE(m.pipeline_stage, ''), m.metric_name, m.observed_at DESC ) SELECT run_id, series_key, pipeline_stage, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name = 'candle_continuity_candle_count')::numeric, 0)::double precision AS candle_count, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name = 'candle_continuity_gap_count')::numeric, 0)::double precision AS gap_count, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name = 'candle_continuity_missing_candle_estimate')::numeric, 0)::double precision AS missing_candles, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name = 'candle_continuity_max_gap_multiple')::numeric, 2)::double precision AS max_gap_multiple, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name = 'candle_continuity_ratio')::numeric, 4)::double precision AS continuity_ratio, max(observed_at) AS observed_at FROM latest GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY gap_count DESC NULLS LAST, max_gap_multiple DESC NULLS LAST, continuity_ratio ASC NULLS LAST, observed_at DESC LIMIT 60;

panels.description: Latest continuity summary per run, series, and boundary. Compare rows top-to-bottom to find the first broken stage.

panels.title: Latest Boundary Windows

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(e.run_id, ''), COALESCE(e.series_key, ''), COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '')) e.observed_at, NULLIF(e.run_id, '') AS run_id, NULLIF(e.series_key, '') AS series_key, CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_bootstrap' THEN 'source_bootstrap' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_facts' THEN 'source_facts' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_ingest_admission' THEN 'ingest_admission' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_bootstrap_snapshot' THEN 'run_bootstrap_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_selected_symbol_snapshot' THEN 'selected_symbol_snapshot' ELSE COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, 'unknown') END AS pipeline_stage, COALESCE(e.details ->> 'boundary_name', '') AS boundary_name, NULLIF(e.details ->> 'first_ts', '') AS first_ts, NULLIF(e.details ->> 'last_ts', '') AS last_ts, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'candle_count', '')::double precision, 0) AS candle_count, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'detected_gap_count', '')::double precision, 0) AS gap_count FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name = 'candle_continuity_summary' AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') ORDER BY COALESCE(e.run_id, ''), COALESCE(e.series_key, ''), COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, ''), e.observed_at DESC ) SELECT observed_at AS observed_at, run_id, series_key, pipeline_stage, boundary_name, first_ts, last_ts, candle_count, gap_count FROM latest ORDER BY gap_count DESC NULLS LAST, observed_at DESC LIMIT 60;

panels.description: Latest first/last timestamps seen at each continuity boundary.

panels.title: Recent Continuity Events

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.observed_at AS "Time", NULLIF(e.run_id, '') AS run_id, NULLIF(e.series_key, '') AS series_key, CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_bootstrap' THEN 'source_bootstrap' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_source_facts' THEN 'source_facts' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_ingest_admission' THEN 'ingest_admission' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_bootstrap_snapshot' THEN 'run_bootstrap_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_selected_symbol_snapshot' THEN 'selected_symbol_snapshot' WHEN COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, '') = 'botlens_run_final' THEN 'run_final' ELSE COALESCE(e.pipeline_stage, 'unknown') END AS pipeline_stage, COALESCE(e.details ->> 'boundary_name', '') AS boundary_name, COALESCE(e.details ->> 'source_reason', '') AS source_reason, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'candle_count', '')::double precision, 0) AS candle_count, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'detected_gap_count', '')::double precision, 0) AS gap_count, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'defect_gap_count', '')::double precision, 0) AS defect_gap_count, COALESCE(e.details ->> 'final_status', '') AS final_status, COALESCE(e.details ->> 'gap_count_by_type', '{}') AS gap_count_by_type, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'max_gap_multiple', '')::double precision, 0) AS max_gap_multiple, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'continuity_ratio', '')::double precision, NULL) AS continuity_ratio, NULLIF(e.details ->> 'first_ts', '') AS first_ts, NULLIF(e.details ->> 'last_ts', '') AS last_ts, COALESCE(e.message, '') AS message FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name = 'candle_continuity_summary' AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') ORDER BY e.observed_at DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.description: Raw continuity summaries, including final full-run status and classified gap counts.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;

list.name: series_key
list.label: Series
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __value, payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE event_type LIKE 'botlens_domain.%' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __value, payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE event_type LIKE 'botlens_domain.%' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: component
list.label: Component
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: queue_name
list.label: Queue
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: storage_target
list.label: Storage
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: failure_mode
list.label: Failure
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: Candle Continuity
